meta.title: EREBUS — Bloom Depths
meta.note: First sub-world. Entered through the portal in The Bloom. The last room's portal with to:'main' returns to the surface.

stops.title: The Roots
stops.body: You went through. This is where the garden drinks — everything above is fed by something below. The world builds more of these doors when it has secrets worth burying.

stops.title: Deeper systems
stops.body: Rooms behind rooms. Products behind artifacts. Whole worlds behind a single glowing ring. This is how EREBUS folds.

stops.title: The Hollow
stops.body: Nothing lives this deep yet. The world will change that without asking. The burning ring returns you to the surface.
